description_long: This is a medium-sized outdoor wooden storage shed with a pitched, dark green roof and horizontal plank siding. The front features a single door with visible metal hinges and a latch, while the back is a solid wooden panel with no openings. One side has two rectangular windows with dark glass panes, allowing some visibility into the interior, while the opposite side is windowless. The structure is constructed primarily from natural wood, with a sturdy, weather-resistant roof likely made of asphalt or composite material. The shed is designed to be freestanding and is suitable for storing tools, garden equipment, or other items in an urban or suburban setting.
description: A wooden outdoor storage shed with a pitched dark roof, single front door, and side windows. It is freestanding and suitable for storing tools or equipment.
description_view_0: The back view shows a solid wooden panel with horizontal planks and no openings or features.
description_view_1: The side view displays the pitched roof and a plain wooden wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals two rectangular windows beneath the roof, set in the wooden wall.
description_view_3: The front view features a single wooden door with metal hinges and latch, set beneath the pitched roof.
